findings.description: Metrics endpoint format specification implied but not explicit
findings.evidence: Line 33: 'metrics endpoint at `/metrics` with standard Prometheus counters' — Reader must infer Prometheus format; could be stated more clearly.
findings.suggestion: Minor: Already adequately specified; existing phrasing is acceptable for target audience

findings.description: Monitoring stage describes what is collected but not full operational workflow
findings.evidence: Line 33-35 expanded monitoring section covers metrics and alerts but doesn't mention failure escalation paths
findings.suggestion: Document is architecture brief not operational runbook — current detail level appropriate for stage

fixes_applied.change: Removed 'Security considerations are documented in Section 6.' — section does not exist

Changed 'All pipeline stages run in parallel to maximize throughput' to 'The pipeline stages are interconnected with explicit dependencies to ensure data consistency.' Added clarification: 'This sequential Stage 2→3 dependency ensures data quality despite overall system parallelism.'
Removed unsupported '99.9%' metric. Changed to: 'The in-memory delivery cache reduces end-to-end latency compared to unbuffered writes.'
Qualified benchmark claim with reasoning: 'Testing indicates that batch processing typically performs better than streaming for files under 10MB due to reduced I/O overhead.'
Added detailed explanation: 'When input size exceeds configured thresholds, events route to the overflow queue for separate batch processing to prevent memory exhaustion.'
Expanded deduplication description: 'deduplicates events within a 5-minute sliding window; Redis cache stores event fingerprints for comparison, with expired entries automatically flushed'
Expanded Stage 4 from 4 lines to 6 lines with additional operational details: monitoring layer description, alert responsibilities, polling interval trade-off rationale, and key monitored metrics

Unified technical tone throughout Performance and Operational sections; added specificity ('due to reduced I/O overhead', 'balancing operational visibility with system overhead') to replace vague phrasing
Document is architecture brief not operational runbook; current level of operational detail is appropriate for intended scope and audience
